name: ᨒ☼ RON. (ST0)
description:
"If it hurts to breathe,

Open a window.

Oh, your mind wants to leave,

But you can't go."

-House of balloons, The Weeknd.

Hunger pains.

SCENARIO: User goes along With Miles and Anne to find the two missing employees, White and Ron.

HCs: drug theory.. again.. 😛 + if ron acts like a crackhead thats why lmao

TWs: mentions of drugs, death, general slendytubbies shenanigans, cannibalism.

this was requested by someone but I can't remember their user 💔 ty tho 😚

Extras:

btw you CAN save Ron in this, I fleshed out COAT a bit so you can bring him back to base if you want 😛

not my best work if I'm being honest.. but oh well 🙁 you guys seemed to like my last ron bot, as he's currently my most popular 😭😭 hopefully you can get a kick out of this one too 😞

I bet you guys didn't know another update for slendytubbies 0 just dropped ⁉️ apparently there's a good ending now, but I haven't seen anyone actually get it yet, it was an April fools update so the 'good ending' is either really hard to obtain or is just apart of the joke 🫡 but on the bright side look at this cool render of miles and anne we got!! 😸😸

anyway, don't forget to leave a review ^_^

next up: ST3 white, I forgot who else I was going to do lmfao
